data.name: Art Girl 2
data.detailed_description:
介紹


這是一個卡牌2d刷怪，刷錢，刷裝備的遊戲，有一些漂亮的妹子圖片

1.卡牌技能自動戰鬥，無需手動出牌。
2.採用用回合製戰鬥模式，通過卡牌自定義組合，以及卡片3連升級。
3.擁有3個地圖 大草原，雪地，戰場 ，每個地圖難度不一樣。
4.卡牌種類多 有主動技能，被動技能 。物理攻擊類，法術類，召喚類等。
5.卡牌名稱有“回眸”，“撩發”，“思考”，“雙馬尾”，“柔情似水”等
6.擁有武器裝備系統，可以裝備和強化武器，可穿戴裝備有 武器，衣服，寶物

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 簡體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / Windows 8 / Windows 10/11 64 bit
  • 處理器: 2.20GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD4400
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Art Girl 2
data.detailed_description:
Introduction


This is a card 2d game for spawning monsters, brushing money, and brushing equipment. There are some beautiful pictures of girls

1. Card skills automatically fight, no need to manually play cards.
2. Adopt the turn-based battle mode, customize the combination through the card, and upgrade the card 3 times.
3. There are 3 maps: Prairie, Snow, and Battlefield, and the difficulty of each map is different.
4. There are many types of cards with active skills and passive skills. Physical attacks, spells, summons, etc.
5. Card names include "Looking Back", "Hairing Up", "Thinking", "Twin Ponytails", "Tenderness Like Water", etc.
6. It has a weapon equipment system, which can equip and strengthen weapons. Wearable equipment includes weapons, clothes, and treasures
